mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_driver (tenant_id, channel_id, driver_name, license_no, mobile, status) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{channelId}, #{driverName}, #{licenseNo}, #{mobile}, 'ACTIVE')
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_driver SET driver_name = #{driverName}, license_no = #{licenseNo}, mobile = #{mobile}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE driver_id = #{driverId}
UPDATE tb_driver SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE driver_id = #{driverId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_vehicle (tenant_id, channel_id, plate_no, vehicle_type, status) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{channelId}, #{plateNo}, #{vehicleType}, 'ACTIVE')
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_vehicle SET plate_no = #{plateNo}, vehicle_type = #{vehicleType}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE vehicle_id = #{vehicleId}
UPDATE tb_vehicle SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE vehicle_id = #{vehicleId}
mapper.select: SELECT m.*, d.driver_name, v.plate_no, v.vehicle_type FROM tb_driver_vehicle m JOIN tb_driver d ON m.driver_id = d.driver_id JOIN tb_vehicle v ON m.vehicle_id = v.vehicle_id WHERE m.driver_id = #{driverId} OR m.vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} ORDER BY m.assigned_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_driver_vehicle (driver_id, vehicle_id, assigned_at, is_current, status) VALUES (#{driverId}, #{vehicleId}, NOW(), 'Y', 'ACTIVE')
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_driver_vehicle SET unassigned_at = NOW(), is_current = 'N', status = 'INACTIVE' WHERE (driver_id = #{driverId} OR vehicle_id = #{vehicleId}) AND is_current = 'Y'
